home.heroSubtitle: A specialized higher institute dedicated to training the next generation of healthcare leaders, practical, ethical, and ready for the world.
home.whySubtitle: Six concrete reasons families and students pick UBHI for healthcare training.
home.featureOneBody: Real wards, real equipment, real cases. Practicals happen on campus from day one.
home.featureTwoBody: Recognized qualifications that travel with you, at home and abroad.
home.featureThreeBody: Safe, comfortable housing right on campus so you focus on what matters.
home.featureFourBody: Competitive fees, flexible installments, and merit scholarships for top performers.
home.featureFiveBody: Faculty who have practiced what they teach and care about your outcome.
home.featureSixBody: Reliable Wi-Fi across the campus for study, research, and staying connected.
home.programsTeaserBody: From Nursing to Medical Imaging, our departments are built around in-demand healthcare careers.
home.ctaTitle: Your career in healthcare starts here.
home.ctaBody: Applications for the new intake are open. Complete the four-step process and join us.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Unique Bilingual Higher Institute is a specialized institution dedicated to the training and development of healthcare professionals. Established in 2020, the institution is modern and forward-thinking, with a clear mission to provide quality, practical, and career-oriented education in the health sciences.
about.para2: Since its creation, the institution has been committed to shaping competent, ethical, and skilled healthcare professionals who are equipped to meet the growing demands of the healthcare sector and improve patient outcomes in diverse settings.
about.para3: We combine academic excellence with hands-on clinical training to ensure that our graduates are not only knowledgeable but also practice-ready, compassionate, and capable of delivering high-quality care in today's dynamic healthcare environment.
about.missionBody: To provide quality, practical, and career-oriented education in the health sciences, producing graduates who are technically excellent and ethically grounded.
about.visionBody: To be a leading bilingual institute of healthcare education in Central Africa, recognized for graduate quality and industry impact.
about.value1Body: We hold ourselves to rigorous academic and clinical standards.
about.value2Body: Ethics in practice are non-negotiable in healthcare.
about.value3Body: Patient-centered care starts with how we train.
about.value4Body: Graduates who serve in both English and French communities.

programs.title: Top Programs
programs.subtitle: Career-focused programs across the health sciences and beyond, designed in partnership with healthcare employers.

labels.feesSubtitle: Fee breakdown for each level of the Higher National Diploma.
labels.feesNote: Fees are payable in installments. Merit scholarships are available for qualifying applicants. See the Tuition page for the full breakdown.
labels.applyCtaBody: Ready to take the next step? Submit your application and join the next cohort of UBHI healthcare professionals.

nursing.name: Nursing & Health Sciences
nursing.desc: Train as a registered nurse with comprehensive clinical and academic preparation across patient care, public health, and emergency response.
nursing.tagline: Train as a compassionate, clinically-skilled registered nurse.
nursing.overview: The Nursing & Health Sciences program prepares you for a career caring for patients across hospitals, clinics, and community settings. Through a balance of classroom theory, simulation labs, and supervised clinical placements, you develop the technical competencies and clinical judgement needed to deliver safe, evidence-based care from day one.

midwifery.name: Midwifery
midwifery.desc: Specialized preparation in maternal and newborn care, antenatal and postnatal support, and safe delivery practice.
midwifery.tagline: Specialized in maternal, newborn, and reproductive health.
midwifery.overview: The Midwifery program trains professionals to support women through pregnancy, childbirth, and the postnatal period. You learn evidence-based practice in antenatal monitoring, safe delivery, neonatal care, and reproductive health counselling, preparing you to serve in both clinical and community contexts.

physiotherapy.name: Physiotherapy
physiotherapy.desc: Movement, rehabilitation, and recovery, restore function and quality of life across age groups and conditions.
physiotherapy.tagline: Movement, recovery, and rehabilitation across the lifespan.
physiotherapy.overview: Physiotherapy at UBHI trains you to assess, treat, and rehabilitate patients with movement and musculoskeletal challenges. Through anatomy-grounded coursework, hands-on technique labs, and supervised practice in clinics, you graduate ready to restore function, manage pain, and improve quality of life.

imaging.name: Medical Imaging Technology
imaging.desc: Operate diagnostic imaging equipment and interpret results that drive clinical decisions.
imaging.tagline: Operate the diagnostic imaging modern medicine relies on.
imaging.overview: Medical Imaging Technology prepares you to operate the X-ray, ultrasound, CT, and MRI equipment modern medicine depends on. You learn the physics, anatomy, patient positioning, radiation safety, and image quality skills needed to support accurate diagnoses every day.

pharmacy.name: Pharmacy Technology
pharmacy.desc: Support safe medication management, dispensing, and pharmacy operations in clinical and community settings.
pharmacy.tagline: Safe medication management in clinical and community pharmacy.
pharmacy.overview: The Pharmacy Technology program equips you to support pharmacists in dispensing, compounding, inventory management, and patient counselling. Coursework grounded in pharmacology, plus structured pharmacy placements, builds the precision and ethics required for safe medication practice.

lab.name: Medical Laboratory Sciences
lab.desc: Run the tests that diagnose disease: biochemistry, microbiology, hematology, and beyond.
lab.tagline: Run the diagnostic tests that find disease.
lab.overview: Medical Laboratory Sciences prepares you to perform and interpret the lab tests that drive clinical decisions. Through biochemistry, microbiology, hematology, parasitology, and immunology coursework, paired with hands-on lab and hospital placements, you become an essential member of the diagnostic team.

dental.name: Dental Therapy
dental.desc: Preventive and restorative oral healthcare delivery in clinical and community contexts.
dental.tagline: Preventive and restorative oral healthcare for all ages.
dental.overview: Dental Therapy trains you to deliver routine and preventive oral healthcare: examinations, cleanings, basic restorations, and patient education. You combine pre-clinical lab work with supervised practice in dental clinics, learning to care for patients across all age groups.

management.name: Health Care Management
management.desc: Lead and operate healthcare organizations: administration, policy, and quality improvement.
management.tagline: Lead and operate healthcare organizations and services.
management.overview: Health Care Management prepares you to run the operational side of healthcare: staffing, finance, quality, compliance, and patient experience. You combine business fundamentals with healthcare-specific coursework and applied projects to graduate ready to lead in hospitals, NGOs, and ministries.

computing.name: Computer Engineering
computing.desc: Build the digital systems modern healthcare depends on, from records to telemedicine.
computing.tagline: Build the digital systems modern healthcare depends on.
computing.overview: Computer Engineering at UBHI focuses on the systems healthcare runs on: electronic medical records, telemedicine, hospital networks, and clinical data. You build software engineering and systems fundamentals while learning the unique constraints of healthcare technology: privacy, reliability, and human-centered design.

admissions.title: Admissions
admissions.subtitle: A clear, four-step process. Submit your application, your documents, your fees, and receive admission.
admissions.step1Body: Duly complete and submit the official application form. You can apply online or in person at our campus.
admissions.step2Body: Provide all required academic and supporting documentation: transcripts, certificates, and identification.
admissions.step3Body: Pay the prescribed application and registration fees. We accept multiple secure payment methods.
admissions.step4Body: Obtain official admission approval from the institution and prepare for orientation.
admissions.requirementsSubtitle: Three admission tracks. Pick the one that matches your background.

hnd.title: HND
hnd.tagline: Higher National Diploma, our flagship 3-year healthcare track.

bachelor.title: Bachelor (BSc)
bachelor.tagline: One-year top-up to a Bachelor's degree, for HND graduates.

vocational.title: Vocational
vocational.tagline: Short, practical courses for fast entry into healthcare practice.

tuition.title: School Tuition & Fees Structure
tuition.intro: Our tuition fees are structured to suit different programs while maintaining high academic standards. We also provide flexible payment plans, allowing students and parents to pay fees in installments rather than a single lump sum, so financial constraints do not prevent qualified students from pursuing their education.

tracks.hndSubtitle: Three-year Higher National Diploma. Fees are broken down by level below.
tracks.bachelorSubtitle: One-year top-up after HND. Two clean line items.
tracks.vocationalSubtitle: One-year practical track designed for fast workforce entry.

tuition.scholarshipBody: Unique Bilingual Higher Institute is committed to recognizing and rewarding academic excellence. In line with this commitment, the institution offers merit-based scholarship opportunities to outstanding and deserving candidates. Students who obtain a minimum of 15 points in their Advanced Level results are eligible to apply. These scholarships are designed to support high-achieving students and promote continued academic success.
tuition.tier1Detail: 18+ A-Level points, up to 50% tuition reduction
tuition.tier2Detail: 15 to 17 A-Level points, up to 25% tuition reduction
tuition.tier3Detail: Case-by-case review for qualified students facing financial hardship
tuition.paymentPlanBody: Pay in two, three, or four installments aligned with the academic calendar. Talk to our bursar for a plan that fits your family.

studentLife.title: Student Life
studentLife.subtitle: A vibrant campus community of future professionals: clubs, clinical placements, sports, and lifelong friendships.
studentLife.section1Body: Real-world clinical experience starts early. Our partnerships with hospitals and clinics across the region put you in the field, learning from practicing professionals.
studentLife.section2Body: Student-led organizations covering everything from public health advocacy and research clubs to debate, music, and entrepreneurship.
studentLife.section3Body: On-campus fitness facilities, intramural leagues, and wellness programs that keep you balanced through demanding semesters.
studentLife.section4Body: Practice both languages every day, in class, in residence, and at student events. Our community lives bilingual.
studentLife.event1Body: Students present clinical research alongside industry practitioners.
studentLife.event2Body: Free screening clinics organized by student volunteers each semester.
studentLife.event3Body: Celebrating each cohort of professionals ready to serve.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Admissions questions, partnership ideas, or anything in between.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help…
